case_title: ENGELMAN ACCOUNTANCY CORPORATION VS. RICHARD T. RUSHING

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER ENGELMAN ACCOUNTANCY CORPORATION
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $983.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE JUL-04-2008, FILED BY PETITIONER ENGELMAN ACCOUNTANCY CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER ENGELMAN ACCOUNTANCY CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONFIRM CONTRACT ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER ENGELMAN ACCOUNTANCY CORPORATION RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT RUSHING, RICHARD T. $152,739.90 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $152,739.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Confirm Contract Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER ENGELMAN ACCOUNTANCY CORPORATION'S Motion For Order To Confirm Contract Arbitration Award IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB)
